desc:
Bug 1592682 - Add Section Headers in login list for date and alert sorts. r=jaws,tgiles,fluent-reviewers

Add Section Headers in login list (about:logins) for date and alert sorts.

Differential Revision: https://phabricator.services.mozilla.com/D120788

lines.l: +/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public
+ * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this
+ * file, You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */
+  scroll-padding-top: 24px; /* there is the section header that is sticky to the top */
/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public
* License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this
* file, You can obtain one at http://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */
+  // TODO: name should use the ICU API, see Bug 1592834
+  now.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0); // reset to start of day
export default class LoginList extends HTMLElement {
// An array of login GUIDs, stored in sorted order.
// A map of login GUID -> {login, listItem}.
+    // A map of section header -> sectionItem
@@ -123,24 +186,50 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
-    // Re-arrange the login-list-items according to their sort
+      // Re-arrange the login-list-items according to their sort and
@@ -162,16 +251,32 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
// Make available the "alerts" option but don't change the
// selected sort so the user's current task isn't interrupted.
@@ -204,16 +309,17 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
@@ -327,16 +433,18 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
@@ -415,16 +523,17 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
@@ -450,26 +559,28 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
// Don't restore to the 'alerts' sort if there are no alerts to show.
* @param {login} login A login that was added to storage.
// Add the list item and update any other related state that may pertain
// to the list item such as breach alerts.
@@ -481,20 +592,22 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
* @param {login} login A login that was modified in storage. The related
// Update any other related state that may pertain to the list item
// such as breach alerts that may or may not now apply.
* @param {login} login A login that was removed from storage. The related
@@ -572,16 +685,30 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
@@ -626,30 +753,53 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
is(loginListItems[2].dataset.guid, TEST_LOGIN_2.guid, "The third login should be TEST_LOGIN_2");
ok(!loginListItems[2].classList.contains("vulnerable"), "The third login should not have the .vulnerable class");
ok(!loginListItems[2].classList.contains("breached"), "The third login should not have the .breached class");
is(alertIcon.src, "chrome://mochitests/content/chrome/browser/components/aboutlogins/tests/chrome/test_login_list.html",  "The alert icon src should be empty");
+    ok(false, `The ${username} wasn't in the list of logins.`)
ok(isHidden(emptySearchText), "The empty search text should be hidden when there are results in the list");
ok(isHidden(emptySearchText), "The empty search text should be hidden when there are results in the list");
ok(!gLoginList._sortSelect.disabled, "The sort should be enabled when there are visible logins in the list");
ok(isHidden(emptySearchText), "The empty search text should be hidden when there are results in the list");
ok(gLoginList._sortSelect.disabled, "The sort should be disabled when there are no visible logins in the list");
ok(!isHidden(emptySearchText), "The empty search text should be visible when there are no results in the list");
ok(!gLoginList._sortSelect.disabled, "The sort should be re-enabled when there are visible logins in the list");
ok(isHidden(emptySearchText), "The empty search text should be hidden when there are results in the list");
is(JSON.parse(countSpan.getAttribute("data-l10n-args")).count, 2, "Count should be reset to full list length");
-  is(loginListItems[2].querySelector(".username").textContent, "http_auth_user", "Verify the login with a matching httpRealm is visible");
about-logins-login-list-empty-search-description = There are no results matching your search.
about-logins-login-intro-heading-logged-out2 = Looking for your saved logins? Turn on sync or import them.
login-intro-description = If you saved your logins to { -brand-product-name } on a different device, here’s how to get them here:
login-intro-instructions-fxa = Create or sign in to your { -fxaccount-brand-name(capitalization: "sentence") } on the device where your logins are saved.
login-intro-instructions-fxa-settings = Go to Settings > Sync > Turn on syncing… Select the Logins and passwords checkbox.
